title: Firefox: essential extensions
body: I have been meaning to publish a post for a while now with a list of the extensions I use in my browser. I use Firefox because it has this great ability to install extensions for almost anything you want to do, whether for a developer, a designer or a blogger. Masters of the web have published this list of [extensions for Firefox that every developer should have](http://www.maestrosdelweb.com/editorial/extensiones-para-firefox-que-todo-desarrollador-debe-tener/).
